content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 2, 1), (2, 3, 3), (1, 9, 4), (2, 4, 5), (6, 8, 5), (6, 7, 6), (1, 5, 9), (1, 4, 10), (3, 7, 10), (3, 5, 11), (4, 8, 14), (5, 9, 18)]

At time 1:

* Edge (1, 2, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 3, 3) has node 2 and time 3. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 9, 4) has node 1 but time is 4 (not 1). -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 4, 5) has node 2 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 8, 5) has node 6 and time 5. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 7, 6) has node 6 and time 6. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 5, 9) has node 1 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 4, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 7, 10) has node 3 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 5, 11) has node 3 and time 11. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 8, 14) has node 4 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 9, 18) has node 5 and time 18. -> Add node 9.

The nodes matched at time 1 are 2, 3, 5, 4, 7, 8, 9, 10, and 11.

Answer: [2, 3, 5, 4, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11]
